exemplar.title: To what extent is continuity of identity dependent on continuity of memory?

detailedExemplarData.title: To what extent is continuity of identity dependent on continuity of memory?

strengths: Explicit and precise formulation of the philosophical issue in both title and introduction
Clear, repeated justification linking the Winter Soldier scene to the memoryâidentity problem
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay consistently and explicitly identifies the issue (âTo what extent is continuity of identity dependent on continuity of memory?â) and provides a detailed, clear justification of its connection to the stimulus. This fully meets the highest-band descriptors (3/3).

strengths: Smooth section transitions and clear topic sentences maintain coherence throughout
weaknesses: A trailing sentence in the introduction (âeven though every personâ¦â) disrupts flow
Footnote rendered as a math expression interrupts readability
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Despite minor lapses in sentence completion and reference formatting, the response is well structured and entirely coherent, meriting full marks (4/4) for clarity.

strengths: Accurate, detailed presentation of Locke, Reid, Parfit and Hume with nuanced explanations
Consistent and appropriate use of technical philosophical vocabulary throughout
weaknesses: Occasional factual compression and a minor formatting slip (âformally best friendâ),
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay demonstrates relevant, accurate, and well-developed knowledge, and employs philosophical vocabulary appropriately throughout, satisfying the top-band criteria (4/4).

strengths: Well-developed critical analysis weighing multiple theories
Effective use of the Winter Soldier narrative and cognitive-science examples
Clear identification and examination of counter-arguments (Reid, bundle-theory, biological continuity)
weaknesses: Some analytical threads (e.g. moral responsibility, social roles) are underdeveloped
Reliance on older sources for biological-continuity critique
Leibnizâs indiscernibility critique needs clearer development
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation moves well beyond description, offering critical depth and varied examples. Minor underdevelopments justify one-mark deduction from the top band, resulting in a score of 7/8.

strengths: Clear evaluation of alternative viewpoints and theories
Most main points are fully justified with theoretical and stimulus-based support
A consistent, well-argued conclusion that directly answers the research question
weaknesses: Evaluation lacks discussion of wider implications or forward-looking insight
Engagement with additional secondary literature (e.g. Strawson, Schechtman) would deepen evaluation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay offers a clear, coherent evaluation with well-justified points and a conclusion consistent with the argument. Occasional surface-level aspects are outweighed by its overall strength, justifying the maximum score (6/6).

strandSelections.reasoning: Locke, Reid, Parfit and Hume are accurately outlined with relevant objections and replies. Minor slips (e.g. âformally best friendâ, occasional factual compression) prevent fully âwell-developedâ treatment, but overall knowledge is mostly accurate and explanations are satisfactory.
Lockean, biological and bundle theories are weighed, and strengths and weaknesses are articulated. The evaluation is clear though occasionally surface-level, matching the 3-4 bandâs descriptor.

The final paragraph explicitly answers the research question, synthesising the examined positions and reaffirming the memory-dependence thesis. It is consistent with the preceding argument, but minor repetition and limited forward-looking insight keep it at 5 rather than 6.

The investigation follows a recognisable introduction-argument-counter-argument-evaluation-conclusion outline. Paragraphing is logical and section transitions are smooth, showing effective organisation expected of the top band.

A detailed link between the Winter Soldier scene and the memory/identity debate is established: the loss and return of Buckyâs memories are used to frame the central question and to motivate discussion of Locke, Parfit and Hume. The connection is repeatedly referenced throughout, meeting the rubricâs demand for a clear justification.

Counter-arguments (Reid on transitivity, memory fallibility, bundle-theory objections) are clearly identified and partially examined. Replies are offered but not always pursued in depth, placing the work solidly in the 5-6 range, nearer 5 than 6.

The student explicitly formulates the philosophical problem â âTo what extent is continuity of identity dependent on continuity of memory?â â in the title and reiterates it in the opening paragraph. This satisfies the descriptor of a clear and explicit identification.

The Winter Soldier narrative is consistently mined, and hypotheticals about childhood memory and bodily change bolster points. Examples are apt but not especially wide-ranging or original, warranting the upper score of the 3-4 band rather than the highest.

Technical termsââpsychological continuityâ, âtransitivityâ, âoverlapping chains of connectednessâ, âessential vs accidental propertiesââare used consistently and appropriately across the essay, fulfilling the highest-band descriptor.

Most substantive claims are supported either by theoretical references or by direct ties to the stimulus. Some evaluative leaps lack full evidential backing, so the performance aligns with âmany main points justifiedâ.

The student moves beyond description by weighing theories, analysing the transitivity objection and biological-continuity rival, and tracking how memory loss alters moral agency. While insightful, some analytical threads (e.g. moral responsibility and social roles) are only briefly sketched, so the analysis sits at the lower end of the 5-6 band.

Readers can follow the line of reasoning without difficulty. Topic sentences signal shifts, quotations are integrated, and the conclusion explicitly ties back to the guiding question, so clarity and coherence are maintained throughout.

annotations.comment: The guiding question in the section header is articulated clearly and explicitly, demonstrating a precise identification of the philosophical issue.
The inclusion of the word count is administrative and distracts from the academic presentation; recommend removing it in the final version.
The full movie transcript excerpt provides a vivid stimulus for analysis, grounding the investigation in a concrete example.
Consider adding a brief paraphrase of the dialogueâs key exchanges to reinforce the connection between the stimulus and your analysis.
The introduction explicitly frames the research question and justifies its link to Buckyâs memory loss, showing clear justification of connection.
The sentence at the end of the introduction trails off (âeven though every personâ). Complete or revise it to ensure clarity and coherence.
This introductory segment is densely packed. Breaking it into shorter sentences will improve readability for the reader.
The explanation of Lockeâs psychological continuity theory is accurate and enriched by appropriate technical vocabulary.
The footnote number is rendered as a math expression, which interrupts the flow. Replace it with a standard superscript reference.
Reidâs transitivity objection is introduced but would benefit from an illustrative example to clarify how memory fails transitivity.
You effectively highlight the problematic implications of equating identity solely with biological continuity.
The critique of biological continuity largely references older sources; consider engaging a more recent debate to strengthen your analysis.
To illustrate limits to biological continuity, you might add cases like extreme plastic surgery or split-brain patients.
The description of Parfitâs link memory theory is cogent and clearly distinguishes it from Lockeâs view.
The term âRelation-Râ should be formatted as Relation $R$ to match standard Parfit terminology.
When introducing âpsychological connectedness,â include a concise definition to guide readers unfamiliar with the term.
The integration of cognitive research on memory malleability is insightful and deepens the critique of Parfit.
Consider integrating Schechtmanâs narrative identity concept to enrich the discussion of social and moral dimensions.
The presentation of Humeâs bundle theory is thorough and well-tied to Buckyâs changing perceptions.
The critique invoking Leibnizâs indiscernibility principle is underdeveloped; clarify how this law applies to distinct mental bundles.
Enhance the evaluation by discussing P.F. Strawsonâs critique of Humeâs bundle view to show engagement with secondary literature.
The conclusion synthesizes the positions and answers the research question with consistency to the preceding argument.
The conclusion could be strengthened by suggesting implications for wider philosophical debate or real-world applications.
Consider briefly summarizing why Steveâs final line (âto the end of the lineâ) is philosophically significant in the stimulus section.
The transition from Lockeâs theory to Reidâs objection would benefit from a clear signpost sentence to guide the reader.
